reviews.text: One particular staff member makes me feel quite uncomfortable,  she's of oriental decent with dyed /whitish greyish hair, don't like the way she talks to other staff members, don't like her attitude and the way she thinks she owns the place, she works behind the desk btw, very uncouth individual.  Another thing, if your feeling insecure about certain facial things then these kind of clinics are probably not the best places to go, they make you feel as if your face is deformed by telling you that you need fillers in your chin, BOTOX in your nose etc,  and when they take pictures of you they make sure it looks as horrific as EVER just so that you can buy more treatments, you go there for one thing then leave wanting to top yourself because you've been made to believe your looks are grotesque, their also very very overpriced, I didn't look any different to when I went in.

I was unable to make an appointment with Dr Orel due to the arrogance and bigotry of Phyllis Ross, who was supposed to help me book an appointment and instead proved to be unprofessional and extremely unpleasant. I have sent a written …

Consultant Clinic - Based at 8-10 Harley Street.

Have to agree with all the other reviewers of Consultant Clinic. I've been to CC twice now, once for 2ml of jaw filler which was extortionately overpriced at £800. I then went back to get lip filler from Dr Melissa. I have full lips already so was looking for definition. There is NO WAY that they have achieved the results in the photos on their instagram. The lip filler cost over £400 and was unnoticeable. Now 6 months on i have a lump on one side that i'm booked in elsewhere to have dissolved.
They've done a great job of marketing themselves but the instagram account is managed badly and gives a really unprofessional image.

I would recommend steering clear of this company, there are plenty of good quality, professional doctors out there who will give you realistic expectations of what can or cannot be achieved

The wait is ridiculous. I have been there a few times with different doctor's appointments throughout the years. Minimum waiting time is one or even two hours. Its completely waste of time and I would be avoiding clinics in this place in the future.
I had really bad experience with number 10 harley street &staff rude they kept the deposit really bad customer service never use them again please be careful.
Got there for my appointment, waited over an hour to be told I could still have to wait another hour. Didn't even get an apology from the consultant
Waiting time is unacceptable , chairs in the waiting area is very uncomfortable
Very poor service from doctor who was late for my appointment and clearly not happy in her job. She was supposed to out me at ease lacking bedside manner.
Hard to get to and bad parking, in the congestion charge zone
Doctors renting offices, for some, just to put the address on their letterheads. One told me I probably had the shakes because I "felt intimidated" by him, idiot!
Plush and efficient offices . Prompt . Parking at UKpc Cavendish street.
Very busy clinic with lots of patients being referred through the companies

Very good practice .
Seeing Dr Hu Hannal told me to change GP practices in Shropshire as not getting me meds and not helping me.
But  also the new GP practices didn’t  want to help either, told me go back to London . Now enjoying ,living in London  then  isolated Shropshire I was too depressed.
So never use a GP for mental health
, only make y unwell and pushed me into 🏥🏥.

So I’ve come back to this practice with more help then ever . Now got  Phycist , health worker.
